## Meeting Purpose

  - [Prioritizing finding a "Jimmy clone" - someone with similar skills to handle operations/workflows](https://fathom.video/share/j-cqL8ttd1ygMp9VWX-x5A1Hyxy5JyoV?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)

## Topics

### Remote Onboarding Issues

### Switching to Contractor Model
